Package index

All functions

classement.transitions()
Build transition and difference tables for two classement vectors
club_registry club_registry_archive
Club Registry (Latest Snapshot) and Archive
count.actives()
Count active players
count.players()
Count total players
get.club.list()
Retrieve AFTT club list
get.club.player.list.m()
Retrieve players messieurs list (ranked) for a given club
grille_classements_m
AFTT classement grid (Messieurs)
players.new.classement()
Compute new classement for a set of players and reports upward/downward movements.
players.summary()
Summary (wrapper) of player counts and tables
players_m players_m_archive players_f players_f_archive
Players Registry (Latest Snapshot) and Archive
points2rank()
Compute rank from points
project.tree()
Print a directory tree with optional exclusions
pts_rk_m pts_rk_f
Points–Ranking Reduced Tables
rank2classement()
Estimates 'Messieurs' classement (B2 to NC) from ranking and number of actifs using a grid of average cumulated share of each classement as of share.m.B2toNC() by default
share.m.B2toNC()
Computes the average cumulated percentage by classement from the AFTT classement grille so that classement can be computed for any number of actifs
table.actives.class()
Active players per classement
table.actives.class.l()
Active players per classement letter
table.actives.prov()
Active players per province

Developed by Geoffrey Caruso.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
